title: liatris pauciflora var. secunda
intro: Liatris pauciflora var. secunda, also known as the gayfeather or bluish gayfeather, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the Liatris genus of flowering plants. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Liatris pauciflora var. secunda include its ability to reduce inflammation, boost the immune system, and even exhibit antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
